github.title: GitHub
github.description: Connect your GitHub account to deploy repositories

gitlab.title: GitLab
gitlab.description: Connect your GitLab account to deploy repositories

gitea.title: Gitea
gitea.description: Connect your Gitea or Forgejo instance to deploy repositories

oauth.title: Git Providers
oauth.description: Configure Git provider integrations so users can connect their repositories
oauth.displayNamePlaceholder: e.g. My Org GitHub, Work GitLab
oauth.configureDescription: Enter the OAuth application credentials for {provider}
oauth.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
oauth.noProvidersAvailable: No Git providers have been configured by the administrator yet.
oauth.instanceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No instances} one {# instance} other {# instances}}

github.manifestDescription: Create a GitHub App to let users connect their repositories. The app will be automatically configured with the right permissions.

gitlab.step1: Go to GitLab → Preferences → Applications → New application
gitlab.step2: Set the Redirect URI to: {url}/api/git/oauth/callback and select the scopes: api, read_api, read_repository
gitlab.step3: Copy the Application ID and Secret

gitea.step1: In Gitea, go to Settings → Applications → Manage OAuth2 Applications → Create a new OAuth2 application
gitea.step3: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret

aws.title: Amazon Web Services
aws.description: Add AWS accounts to enable S3 backups
aws.tooltip: Used to store encrypted database and volume backups in Amazon S3. Connect an IAM account with S3 write permissions.
aws.addDescription: Enter your AWS IAM credentials. The user must have S3 write permissions.
aws.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
aws.instanceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No accounts} one {# account} other {# accounts}}

cloudflare.title: Cloudflare
cloudflare.description: Manage DNS records and tunnels with Cloudflare
cloudflare.tooltip: Used to manage DNS records for your domains. Link a Cloudflare account to enable custom domain routing.
cloudflare.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to remove "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
cloudflare.addDescription: Enter your Cloudflare API Token with the following permissions:
